# MarketplaceExtensionConfiguration

**Protocol**

The type for a marketplace extension’s configuration object.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor @preconcurrency protocol MarketplaceExtensionConfiguration : AppExtensionConfiguration
```

## Overview

A marketplace extension ([doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/MarketplaceExtension]) property [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ExtensionFoundation/AppExtension/configuration-swift.property] adopts this protocol.

## Background services

- **MarketplaceExtension**: An extension that facilitates authentication, installation, and launching a marketplace with deep links.

## Inherits From

- AppExtensionConfiguration
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
